title: Implement RPL SourceRoutingHeader insertion for local_mesh forwarding path
description: When is_local_mesh=true, create and insert lichen_rpl::routing::SourceRoutingHeader (per RFC6554) into IPv6 packet before re-compression. Use DAO routes or routing table to build SRH. Update forward logic in Gateway/lichend.rs. Add to project-LICHEN-lug0.
